metadata.raw_text: {"scores": {"clarity": 5, "simplicity": 5, "brevity_economy": 4, "structure_flow": 5, "specificity_precision": 3, "humanity_voice": 4, "overall": 4}, "rationale": "Well-organized memo with clear headers and bullet points that make it instantly scannable. Language is plain and direct throughout—appropriate for a warehouse audience. Structure follows a logical What→Why→Need-to-know→Questions flow. The 30-40% volume figure and specific shift times add useful concreteness, but heavy reliance on bracketed placeholders ([Start Date], [End Date], [date]) leaves the core information hollow; even a sample date range would strengthen it. Closing paragraph has a trace of boilerplate ('Your efforts are critical…we appreciate everything you do') but stays warm without overdoing it. Slight redundancy in the Questions section repeating the 'speak with your supervisor' instruction from earlier. Overall a competent, professional template that would serve well once populated with real details."}

rationale: Well-organized memo with clear headers and bullet points that make it instantly scannable. Language is plain and direct throughout—appropriate for a warehouse audience. Structure follows a logical What→Why→Need-to-know→Questions flow. The 30-40% volume figure and specific shift times add useful concreteness, but heavy reliance on bracketed placeholders ([Start Date], [End Date], [date]) leaves the core information hollow; even a sample date range would strengthen it. Closing paragraph has a trace of boilerplate ('Your efforts are critical…we appreciate everything you do') but stays warm without overdoing it. Slight redundancy in the Questions section repeating the 'speak with your supervisor' instruction from earlier. Overall a competent, professional template that would serve well once populated with real details.
